name: the stone perimeter
identity: A sturdy stone structure that forms the boundary of the communal longhouse, symbolizing the tribe's investment and the beginning of a new settlement.
current_status: Continuing to serve as the foundation for the longhouse while the tribe works to complete the construction, with the stone perimeter providing a protective boundary against the arctic winds.

volatile_state.current_activity: Supporting the construction of the longhouse and providing a protective boundary
